meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Demo Labs - Ajin Abraham - Mobile App Security Testing with MobSF
meta.description: Mobile Security Framework (MobSF) is an automated, all-in-one mobile application (Android/iOS/Windows) pen-testing, malware analysis and security assessment framework capable of performing static and dynamic analysis.
